name: edge-single-apple
notes: Edge: single-ingredient meal. USDA FoodData Central #171688 (apples, raw, with skin): medium apple ~182g ~95 kcal, F 0g, P 0g (rounded). Tests protein=0 + fat=0 divide-by-zero edges. Advisory tier despite USDA precision because portion size 'medium' has 150–210g spread.
